content:
вҖңжҢҒзҒҜиҖ…зҡ„дҪҝеҫ’гҖҒиҜһдәҺзҷҪеӨңд№ӢдәәгҖҒй©ұж•Јй»‘жҡ—иҖ…гҖҒеңЈеҝғеңЈеӯҗпјҢжҲ‘пјҢжіўеҗ•е…Ӣж–ҜпјҢеә”жӮЁзҡ„е‘је”ӨиҖҢжқҘгҖӮвҖқ

вҖңиҝҷйў—иҒҶеҗ¬зҘһж„Ҹзҡ„еҝғи„ҸпјҢдёҺжӮЁжӣҙеҠ йқ иҝ‘дәҶгҖӮвҖқ

вҖ”вҖ”вңҰвҖ”вҖ”вңҰвҖ”вҖ” вңҰвңҰвңҰ вҖ”вҖ”вңҰвҖ”вҖ”вңҰвҖ”вҖ”

"The Apostle of the Lightbearer, scion of the White Night, One who Dispels Darkness, Divus of the Divine HeartвҖ”I, Pollux, have answered your call."

"This heart, which once heeded the divine will, now beats closer to yours."
@everyone
Yooo Pollux he looks so cool <:proud1:1356053120651755641>
Looks cool but ultra skip (i Hope at least)
But you canвҖҷt do this to me after I spent everything to OE Clem and Sal <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
Time to break out that wallet Venush <:point:1356053112292511815>
U know what must be done
Finally Pollux is here I pulled none of the reruns precisely for this
So he will be out the 20th, next monday I guess? <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
Do we know what class hes gonna be?

no but we can bet on it
-# DPS?
Hmm might get him instead of daff then
I wonder if he's gonna synergize with Castor especially
I already have clem and wanda, i was planning to get castor and daff but yeah
replace wanda with pollux and you got an epic team
Castor + Pollux team feels obviousвҖҰВ will there be a rerunвҖҰ? <:pray:1400771650064089112>
Is there any chance for us to gwt castor rerun with pollux? It will be sad for newer palyers to not have both brothers
pls no bc I donвҖҷt have enough pulls
True i am low on pulls too. Dammit.
he is so beautiful i love him
In reviewing the banner history, it would be somewhat sensible for Castor to be a part of the next triple rerun
you can finally fulfill your name <:point:1356053112292511815>
<:proud2:1356053123445297233> i have 600 pulls to my name waiting for his arrival <:bow:1356053037159944473>
you too <:point:1356053112292511815> get +12 pollux so i can steal your account later <:M_satisfy:1400771690321154110>
he is coming home no matter what <:Target:1400771609014435923>
same for me but its because im an f2p <:dead:1356082627509092372> <:dead:1356082627509092372>
do not give me that look! clem is important!

dear parsol
what will it take thee to believe, that yours truly is FH TUH PI?
sincerely, neck biter
you were suppose to oe her!
only 4... i cant even afford loop master sediments are cooked
later. let me wait for gmurphy & pollux then im all clem's
~~my gmurphy is either going to be e1 or oe~~ <:Clown:1400771541423226971>
Oh yah did they say when gmurphey was coming?
um, it should be with anni? no official news yet though <:dead:1356082627509092372>
My gut is saying he is a multi attacking chorus ala Tawil
So he can profit off his Bros corrosion
on behalf of <#1170692781216378960> , is pollux asian?
Never had a waifu again. The only way is to spend it on another game. рҹҳ–

еёғж•Је…үжҳҺзҡ„ж•ҷдјҡпјҢе®һдёәжүјж–ӯз”ҹжңәзҡ„жӯ№дәәпјӣ
е°ҠдёәеңЈеӯҗзҡ„еӯҳеңЁпјҢе®һдёәйҡҫдҝқиҮӘиә«зҡ„еӣҡеҫ’пјӣ
еҸҚжҠ—йҖғеҢҝпјҹеҸӘдјҡи®©дҪ жӣҙеҝ«еҸҳжҲҗйӮӘзҘһзҡ„е…»ж–ҷгҖӮ
е°ұиҝҷж ·пјҢдҝқжҢҒйЎәд»ҺдҝқжҢҒж— е®іпјҢеҲ«и®©дҪ зҡ„жғіжі•гҖҒжҒҗжғ§гҖҒиҪҜиӮӢиў«д»–д»¬зңӢз©ҝгҖӮ

з¬јзҪ©еңЁеәһз„¶йҳҙеҪұд№ӢдёӢзҡ„жғҠжғ§йӣҸйёҹпјҢжӮҹеҮәдәҶиҺ·еҸ–дёҖдёқе–ҳжҒҜжңәдјҡзҡ„жҠҖе·§пјҡ
еңҶж»‘гҖҒж’’и°ҺгҖҒиЎЁжј”вҖҰвҖҰиӢҘиғҪеңЁең°зӢұдёӯдҝқжҠӨеҘҪеҪјжӯӨпјҢжңүдҪ•дёҚеҸҜе‘ўпјҹ
гҖҢжІЎе…ізі»зҡ„пјҢе“Ҙе“ҘгҖӮгҖҚ

вҖ”вҖ”вңҰвҖ”вҖ”вңҰвҖ”вҖ” вңҰвңҰвңҰ вҖ”вҖ”вңҰвҖ”вҖ”вңҰвҖ”вҖ”

The church's preaching light is the true enemyвҖ”a force that strangles life itself.
The twins, though revered as divine, are nothing but stranded prisoners.
To fight or to flee? Either choice simply speeds up the impending doom.

Rule of Survival: *Keep to your orders, be docile and meek... Don't show your thoughts, fear, or any weak spot.*

The fledglings, trapped under that vast shadow, seized the skill to buy a moment's respite:
To be slick and sly, to lie and disguise... Any measure is justified so long as they can protect each other within this hellish prison.
"We'll be fine... Brother."
